name: @udp/filesystem
description: File system backend for United Development Platform

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && pnpm exec esbuild index.ts FileExplorer.tsx FileManager.tsx FileWatcher.ts NodeFileSystem.ts ProjectManager.ts ProjectNavigator.tsx SyncManager.ts VirtualFileSystem.ts WorkspaceManager.ts types.ts --format=esm --platform=node --target=node18 --outdir=dist --outbase=. --bundle=false
